title: Prettier Horses
description: Remodeled and Retextured horses with 4x the amount of combinations!
body:
**Prettier Horses slightly remodels Minecraft horses, donkeys, and mules to give them a fresher look!** 
It also updates the textures of all types of horses to bring them up to modern standards, as well as doubling the amount of horse colours and patterns! This pack now also adds custom baby horse models!

There are also two new variants for Zombie Horses and Donkeys!

**Unicorn variants can rarely spawn in place of normal horses, or if spawned in dark oak forests or named "unicorn".**

![Vanilla Horse vs Prettier Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e6b06704d8e26fdb2d4fac7e23389a6cb27995_0.webp)
with this resource pack, the original 35 combinations of horse colours/markings are upped to over 126!

If you have suggestions or questions, you can ask them anywhere on my mods and projects discord server where i am located.

**Important!!**
This resource pack requires optifine or [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions) to function!

_This pack should be compatible with most packs that retexture horse armor!_

Also check out my other packs:
- [Prettier Cows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-cows)
- [Prettier Sheep](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-sheep)
- [Prettier Parrots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-parrots)
- [Ender Dragon Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ender-dragon-reborn)
